final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, a traditional Chinese long scroll painting.

Style/medium: gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors), traditional Chinese handscroll painting, Tang Dynasty court painting tradition, architectural precision with delicate figure rendering
Composition: bird's-eye panoramic view sweeping across the entire cityscape, horizontal scroll format, multiple focal points showing layers of streets, palaces, and crowds
Subject: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival night, thousands of illuminated lanterns hanging across streets and buildings, crowds in traditional Tang costumes enjoying the festival, palace architecture with upturned eaves
Scene/backdrop: imperial capital cityscape with palace complexes, wide avenues, market districts, city gates visible in distance, festive decorations strung between structures
Lighting/mood: warm golden glow from countless lanterns reflecting on faces and streets, deep indigo night sky as contrast, celebratory and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: mineral pigments in vermilion, azurite blue, malachite green, gold leaf accents, warm lantern orange against cool night blues
Materials/textures: silk scroll surface quality, visible brushwork in architectural lines, layered color washes for depth, fine ink outlines defining forms
Constraints: must maintain horizontal scroll reading flow from right to left; architectural proportions must reflect Tang Dynasty conventions
Avoid: anachronistic elements; modern lighting; photographic realism; Western perspective; anime style; generic clip art lanterns
